metadata.description: Vibecoding 3.0 — Toolkit di skill per spec-driven development con Claude Code: filosofia 3-livelli, routing 3-vie (CLAUDE.md/PROJECT_SPEC/SKILL), protocolli portabili change-request e agentify

plugins.name: vibecoding
plugins.description: Toolkit di skill per spec-driven development. Include 5 skill (methodology, validation-strategies, change-request, agentify, skill-bootstrap), comando /vibecoding:init con routing 3-vie delle desiderata in CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_SPEC e SKILL, e templates per moduli software e cartelle di lavorazione Claude.
